name: Marillen Knoedel
recipeInstructions:
1. On the day before, cook and peel and grate the potatoes. Mix in the flour, cream of wheat, eggs, butter, salt, and nutmeg. Knead well and roll out on a well-floured board, about 1 cm thick. Cut into 3 x 3 inch squares.
2. Wash the apricots and remove the stones. Place a cube of sugar in place of each stone, then put the apricot back together. Place one apricot square in the middle of each dough square. Fold the dough over and with well-floured hands, knead it into a dumpling.
3. Repeat this process for all squares.
4. Bring a pot of water (with a pinch of salt) to a boil. Slide in the dumplings and let them simmer, gently shaking the pot so they don't stick to the bottom, for about 6-8 minutes.
5. They are done when they sink to the bottom of the pot. Serve hot with cinnamon sugar sprinkled on top.
